{{Quote|We have reports that the Yuuzhan Vong are using a slave species called Chazrach which have been bred by the Yuuzhan Vong to be killing machines. They're not as formidable as the Vong, but they will keep coming. They have no free will, so do not try to reason with them.|Master [[Lar Le'Ung]] regarding the Chazrach|<ref name="Invasion 3">[[Invasion 3|''Invasion'' 3]]</ref>}}
The '''Chazrach''' (also known as "reptoids") were a short, stocky, reptilian [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from a [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|distant galaxy]] with snubbed snouts who served the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] as [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] and [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]].

==Overview==
As with the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], the Chazrach were not native to [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], having been enslaved during the Yuuzhan Vong's conquest of [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|their home galaxy]].<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Unlike the Yuuzhan Vong, however, they had a presence in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="NJO Sourcebook">''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]''</ref>

For thousands of [[Standard year/Legends|years]], the Chazrach were bred in large numbers as expendable support troops. A pair of dome-like calcifications protruded from the forehead of each Chazrach, inhibiting their autonomy and allowing their Yuuzhan Vong masters to control them. However, this proved to be a disadvantage in battle since they could be easily killed.<ref name="NJO Sourcebook" /> In battle, the Chazrach were controlled by warbeasts such as [[Thrall herder]]s and [[Rakamat]]s. If a warbeast was destroyed, the Chazrach associated with it would attack anything that moved, including each other.<ref name="Onslaught">''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]''</ref>

[[File:InvasionRefugeeChazrach.jpg|thumb|right|150px|A Chazrach reports to [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Tsalok]].]]
Any form of cognizance and initiative that was possessed by the base species vanished over the generations of genetic tampering by the [[shaper caste]].<ref name="NJO Sourcebook" /> This flaw, combined with their small, stocky statures made them incapable of mastering the use of the standard [[amphistaff]] used by the [[warrior caste]] as a whip. The reptoids instead use the inflexible [[coufee]], which was better suited to their body form, and an inferior breed of the amphistaff. A few Chazrach served the Yuuzhan Vong so well over the generations that they were permitted to join the warrior caste at its most basic levels.<ref name="Ruin">''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]''</ref>

==History==
At some point in the past, the Yuuzhan Vong conquered the Chazrach, and began breeding the creatures to serve as shock troopers during their wars. While not as formidable as the warrior caste, they proved to be single minded and were incapable of being reasoned with.<ref name="Invasion 3" /> They accompanied their masters onboard the [[Koros-Strohna|worldships]] and later participated in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TNEC" />

The first notable engagement where the Chazrach were used was during the [[Battle of Dantooine (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Dantooine]], in which the reptoids were used to attack the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces on the planet. However, once [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] killed the Thrall Herder, the mental control over the Chazrach was removed and the creatures became feral; attacking one another and anything in their sight.<ref name="Onslaught" /> Later, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Shedao Shai]] used Chazrach in the [[Battle of Ithor]].<ref name="Ruin" />

Reptoids were also seen during the [[Evacuation of Rychel|invasion]] of [[Rychel]] where they battled against [[New Republic soldier/Legends|New Republic troopers]].<ref name="Invasion 3" /> They also saw action during the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|conquest]] of the New Republic capital of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="Star by Star">''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''</ref>

These creatures remained loyal to their masters throughout the conflict and defended the [[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] at the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]], where the Yuuzhan Vong were defeated after the death of [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane]].<ref name="Unifying Force">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>
